name: Brandied Gorgonzola Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the gorgonzola cheese and sour cream in a bowl.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add white pepper and brandy, then blend well.
4. Cover the mixture and chill.
5. Makes about 1 1/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Cherry Tomatoes, Green Zucchini, Jicama, Pearapple, Anjou Pear, Nectarine
